assertionResults.title: documents dual entry: guest/canvas hybrid + open3d pilot native

assertionResults.fullName: P01 host wiring (import graph + source) live route/host sources import the open3d chain (file text, no render)

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas renders the command workflow and catalog proof

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas runs toolbar and keyboard commands
assertionResults.title: runs toolbar and keyboard commands

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas draws, previews, cancels, and undoes a wall
assertionResults.title: draws, previews, cancels, and undoes a wall

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas commits wall geometry through workspace canvas history
assertionResults.title: commits wall geometry through workspace canvas history

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas creates a real room instead of falling back to wall-only drawing
assertionResults.title: creates a real room instead of falling back to wall-only drawing

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas supports click and drag placement producing validated PlannerPlacementPayload via onPlace (task7; GS: REC-02 Sketchfab cap, BP-06 loader consumer, Fuse+RAC)

assertionResults.title: select tool empty click clears selection to none

assertionResults.title: select tool pointer on wall midpoint sets wall selection by id

assertionResults.title: select tool pointer near door position prefers door over wall

assertionResults.title: select tool pointer near window position prefers window over wall

assertionResults.fullName: open3d FeasibilityCanvas select tool pointer inside room polygon sets room selection by id
assertionResults.title: select tool pointer inside room polygon sets room selection by id

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDoorWindowPlacement additional branches (TDD) handleWallClick returns result for door and window modes (exercises placement branches)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDoorWindowPlacement additional branches (TDD) edit modes, update/delete and get* cover edit branches

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDoorWindowPlacement additional branches (TDD) cancel from placing resets state
assertionResults.title: cancel from placing resets state

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDockingSystem viewport + reset (TDD) uses a stable SSR default so data-viewport hydrates (desktop, not window-measured)
assertionResults.title: uses a stable SSR default so data-viewport hydrates (desktop, not window-measured)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDockingSystem viewport + reset (TDD) detects small viewport tier after mount and handles mobile activePanel logic
assertionResults.title: detects small viewport tier after mount and handles mobile activePanel logic

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDockingSystem viewport + reset (TDD) detects tablet tier after mount without hydrating from window on first paint
assertionResults.title: detects tablet tier after mount without hydrating from window on first paint

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDockingSystem viewport + reset (TDD) shell data-viewport matches measured tier after mount (tablet client)
assertionResults.title: shell data-viewport matches measured tier after mount (tablet client)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions useDockingSystem viewport + reset (TDD) reset and full cycle covers default restore branches
assertionResults.title: reset and full cycle covers default restore branches

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions P0.3 data-viewport hydration contract SSR_VIEWPORT_TIER is a stable desktop default (not window-measured)
assertionResults.title: SSR_VIEWPORT_TIER is a stable desktop default (not window-measured)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions P0.3 data-viewport hydration contract useDockingSystem measures real width only after mount (tablet range)
assertionResults.title: useDockingSystem measures real width only after mount (tablet range)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions P0.3 data-viewport hydration contract WorkspaceShell sets data-viewport after mount to measured tier (no SSR/client attr split)
assertionResults.title: WorkspaceShell sets data-viewport after mount to measured tier (no SSR/client attr split)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions PropertiesPanel more entities (TDD) renders door and furniture properties (covers render* branches)
assertionResults.title: renders door and furniture properties (covers render* branches)

assertionResults.fullName: TDD editor coverage additions PropertiesPanel more entities (TDD) groups properties into transform/dimensions/placement/appearance/metadata/actions; supports unit numeric commit/cancel/reset/validation + multi-sel shared + locked reject (task7; GS REC-01/03/04, BP-01, anti-copy semantic)
assertionResults.title: groups properties into transform/dimensions/placement/appearance/metadata/actions; supports unit numeric commit/cancel/reset/validation + multi-sel shared + locked reject (task7; GS REC-01/03/04, BP-01, anti-copy semantic)

assertionResults.title: hides persist actions for guest accessContext

assertionResults.title: passes static presentation hardcoding audit (no raw hex or duplicated visual in JSX; cursor moved to css module)

assertionResults.fullName: OOPlannerWorkspace (TDD) renders loading then workspace shell for guest (covers hydration + shell wiring)
assertionResults.title: renders loading then workspace shell for guest (covers hydration + shell wiring)

assertionResults.fullName: OOPlannerWorkspace (TDD) professional workspace: topbar has project/save/floor/units/2d3d/undo/redo/save + structured menus for import/export/prefs; panels separate catalogue/layers; canvas-max (GS: Figma REC-01 minimize, catalogue-first REC-04, 2026-07-04 benchmark)
